ai_summary: Balaxi Pharmaceuticals Limited has filed its routine quarterly compliance report under SEBI Regulation 74(5) for the period ending June 30, 2026. The report confirms that the company's Registrar and Share Transfer Agent has diligently processed all dematerialization requests, including the cancellation of physical certificates and updating of records, ensuring regulatory adherence. This is a standard compliance filing indicating sound procedural governance with no material financial impacts or red flags identified.
